name: Improper Control of Resource Identifiers ('Resource Injection')
description: The product receives user input that specifies a resource identifier (port number, socket address, file path, database name) but does not restrict or validate the identifier, allowing attackers to access or modify unintended system resources.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a user-controlled resource identifier (port, hostname, file path, database name, queue name) that flows to EXTERNAL[resource_access] or STORAGE[resource_open] without a CONTROL node that validates the identifier against an allowlist or restricts it to intended resources
